records.title: The Anatomy of a Large-Scale Hypertextual Web Search Engine
records.abstract: A public benchmark record describing a search engine that uses PageRank, linked documents, hyperlink structure, and scores computed from linking pages to rank web search results.
records.snippet: uses PageRank, linked documents, hyperlink structure, and scores computed from linking pages

records.title: Authoritative Sources in a Hyperlinked Environment
records.abstract: A public benchmark record for finding authority and hub scores in a link graph, using hyperlink relationships between web pages and recursively reinforced ranking signals.
records.snippet: authority and hub scores in a link graph using hyperlink relationships between web pages

records.title: Database query optimizer using cost estimates
records.abstract: A relational database optimizer estimates execution cost for query plans and storage access paths.
records.snippet: relational database optimizer estimates execution cost

records.title: Method for indexing documents by text content
records.abstract: A text index is generated from terms contained in documents and used for keyword retrieval without using link graph scores.
records.snippet: keyword retrieval without using link graph scores

records.title: MapReduce: Simplified Data Processing on Large Clusters
records.abstract: A public benchmark record describing map and reduce functions over key/value pairs on a distributed system, producing intermediate values grouped by key before reduce processing.
records.snippet: map and reduce functions over key/value pairs on a distributed system

records.title: Dryad: Distributed Data-Parallel Programs from Sequential Building Blocks
records.abstract: A public benchmark record for distributed data-parallel execution graphs that process data records across clusters; it is a close NPL distractor for MapReduce-style distributed processing.
records.snippet: distributed data-parallel execution graphs that process data records across clusters

records.title: Distributed file system with replicated chunk servers
records.abstract: A distributed storage system stores chunks on multiple servers and manages replication; it is infrastructure rather than grouped key/value reduce processing.
records.snippet: distributed storage system stores chunks on multiple servers

records.title: Relational database join planning
records.abstract: A relational database chooses join plans for tables based on cardinality estimates and available indexes.
records.snippet: relational database chooses join plans for tables

records.title: A Baseline for Detecting Misclassified and Out-of-Distribution Examples in Neural Networks
records.abstract: A public benchmark record describing out-of-distribution and misclassified examples, softmax thresholding, and neural network confidence for detecting distribution shift.
records.snippet: out-of-distribution examples, softmax thresholding, and neural network confidence

records.title: Enhancing The Reliability of Out-of-distribution Image Detection in Neural Networks
records.abstract: A public benchmark record for ODIN-style out-of-distribution image detection using temperature scaling and input perturbations to improve threshold-based detection.
records.snippet: out-of-distribution image detection using threshold-based detection

records.title: K-means clustering for feature-vector grouping
records.abstract: A benchmark distractor about assigning feature vectors to clusters and centroids for generic data grouping tasks.
records.snippet: assigning feature vectors to clusters and centroids

records.title: Vehicle lane detection using camera images
records.abstract: A vehicle camera system classifies lane markings and controls steering using camera images and road geometry.
records.snippet: vehicle camera system classifies lane markings and controls steering

records.title: MapReduce: Simplified Data Processing on Large Clusters
records.abstract: A public benchmark seed describing map and reduce functions over key/value pairs on a distributed system, with intermediate values grouped by key before aggregation.
records.snippet: map and reduce functions over key/value pairs on a distributed system

backwardCitations.title: Interpreting the Data: Parallel Analysis with Sawzall
backwardCitations.abstract: A public benchmark citation-neighborhood record describing distributed log analysis, aggregators, and large-scale data processing over records.
backwardCitations.snippet: distributed log analysis with aggregators for large-scale data processing

records.title: Distributed file system with replicated chunk servers
records.abstract: A distributed storage system stores chunks on multiple servers and manages replication; it is infrastructure rather than grouped key/value aggregation.
records.snippet: distributed storage system stores chunks on multiple servers

records.title: Relational database join planning
records.abstract: A relational database chooses join plans for tables based on cardinality estimates and available indexes.
records.snippet: relational database chooses join plans for tables

records.title: A Technique for High-Performance Data Compression
records.abstract: A public benchmark record describing LZW dictionary compression, string table growth, prefix strings, extension characters, and variable length codes for lossless data compression.
records.snippet: dictionary compression with a string table, prefix strings, extension characters, and variable length codes

records.title: Compression of Individual Sequences via Variable-Rate Coding
records.abstract: A public benchmark record describing adaptive dictionary coding for lossless data, storing previously encountered strings and emitting variable-rate codes for matched strings.
records.snippet: adaptive dictionary coding for lossless data using stored strings and variable-rate codes

records.title: Image run length encoding for raster graphics
records.abstract: A raster image system compresses runs of repeated pixels without using a string table or prefix and extension character dictionary.
records.snippet: run length encoding for repeated pixels without dictionary strings

records.title: A Method for the Construction of Minimum-Redundancy Codes
records.abstract: A coding method assigns variable length code words from symbol frequencies but does not build adaptive string-table dictionary entries.
records.snippet: variable length code words from symbol frequencies

records.title: A Method for Obtaining Digital Signatures and Public-Key Cryptosystems
records.abstract: A public benchmark record describing public key cryptography using modular exponentiation, a public encryption key, a private decryption key, and digital signatures.
records.snippet: public key cryptography with modular exponentiation, encryption key, decryption key, and digital signature

records.title: New Directions in Cryptography
records.abstract: A public benchmark record describing public key cryptography, public distribution of encryption keys, authentication, and digital signature concepts.
records.snippet: public key cryptography with public encryption keys and digital signature concepts

records.title: Block cipher apparatus using substitution tables
records.abstract: A symmetric-key block cipher uses shared secret keys and substitution tables rather than public key cryptography with separate encryption and decryption keys.
records.snippet: symmetric-key block cipher with shared secret keys

records.title: Secure Communications Over Insecure Channels
records.abstract: A public benchmark distractor on public-key distribution concepts and secure channels that does not disclose RSA modular exponentiation.
records.snippet: public-key distribution concepts for secure communications over insecure channels

records.title: Method and apparatus for item recommendation using automated collaborative filtering
records.abstract: A public benchmark patent record describing collaborative filtering that stores user profiles, item profiles, ratings, and recommends items to users.
records.snippet: collaborative filtering stores user profiles, item profiles, ratings, and recommends items

records.title: GroupLens: An Open Architecture for Collaborative Filtering of Netnews
records.abstract: A public benchmark record describing collaborative filtering from user ratings to recommend items and articles to users.
records.snippet: collaborative filtering from user ratings to recommend items

records.title: Content-based product search using text matching
records.abstract: A merchant site returns products using keyword text matching and categories without collaborative filtering from user ratings.
records.snippet: keyword text matching without collaborative filtering user ratings

records.title: Matrix Factorization Techniques for Recommender Systems
records.abstract: A later recommender-system survey about latent factors, ratings, and similar items; useful as a distractor because it postdates the public patent anchor.
records.snippet: ratings and similar items in recommender systems
